branch_cards.likely_gain: capture the strongest staged-lineage bridge in its real owner review track while the via-negativa merges and Dionysus lineage are still fresh
branch_cards.likely_cost: one focused playbook evidence pass plus regenerated review surfaces
stop_conditions: stop if the route no longer depends on staged Dionysus lineage plus merged owner truth and is drifting into generic checklist maintenance
stop if the playbook extension starts inventing new automation or deletion authority

branch_cards.likely_gain: strengthen a real reusable publish-hygiene law without widening it beyond its current portability evidence
branch_cards.likely_cost: one focused evidence and readiness refresh plus generated note/catalog parity
stop_conditions: stop if the replay evidence still looks repo-local instead of reusable law
stop if the change starts pushing AOA-T-0096 toward canonical without a non-identical second context

branch_cards.likely_gain: turn inspect-first via-negativa doctrine into concrete owner-local review passes without granting a new cross-repo cleanup authority
branch_cards.likely_cost: multiple owner-specific review routes with stricter source-of-truth checks
stop_conditions: stop if the route starts treating the Dionysus pack or checklist language as an executable deletion order
stop if operator-facing surfaces are being removed before a better surviving home is explicit

hold_option.reason: owner-local pruning judgment and public-share gating still make the broader seed-wave lane too checkpoint-heavy for honest automation promotion
